x-enumeration-literals.name: Real-Time Burn
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Incentives deducted and fulfilled instantly.

Comment:
Example: Immediate cashback conversion.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Batch Burn
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Redemptions processed at scheduled intervals.

Comment:
Example: Monthly cashback payout.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Partner-Integrated Burn
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Requires external partner system validation and confirmation.

Comment:
Example: Airline miles transfer.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Auto-Burn
x-enumeration-literals.description:
Automatic deduction when a condition is met.

Comment:
Example: Auto-apply points to statement balance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Conditional Burn
x-enumeration-literals.description: Executed only after eligibility or threshold validation.
